package repository

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
)

type UserRepository struct {
	db *sql.DB
}

func (r *UserRepository) UpdateUser(ctx context.Context, id string, active bool) error {
	result, err := r.db.ExecContext(ctx, "UPDATE users SET active = ? WHERE id = ?", active, id)
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	rows, err := result.RowsAffected()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	if rows == 0 {
		return sql.ErrNoRows
	}
	return nil
}
